Run for the Republic: Kirtane & Pandit celebrated the 76th Republic day by organising a marathon at the Pune office.
Cert-In: We are proud to announce that we are now one of the few Cert-In certified chartered accountant firms
Envision: Kirtane & Pandit Consulting is proud to partner with IGCC as a Knowledge Partner for Envision 2025, held in Pune on 28th February.
WOFA: We were a gold sponsor at the esteemed WOFA event held by ICAI on 31st Jan- 2nd Feb at Yashobhoomi, Delhi, India

Indirect Taxation

Tax
  • Direct Taxation
  • Indirect Taxation
  • Litigation

At Kirtane & Pandit, we proudly navigate the intricate terrain of indirect taxation with a wealth of expertise and unwavering dedication. We aim to craft comprehensive solutions that cater precisely to the distinctive demands of our clients concerning indirect taxation. With a team of experienced professionals, we have a strong understanding of various areas, including GST, customs and excise duties, and other important indirect tax matters. Our services extend beyond the ordinary; we offer strategic insights, guide you through meticulous tax planning, ensure seamless compliance, and ingeniously optimize your tax positions.

Partnering with us empowers you to effectively mitigate risks, capitalize on advantages, and remain impeccably attuned to the ever-evolving landscape of indirect taxation.




Kirtane & Pandit LLP Chartered Accountants, Chartered Accountants is an Accounting, Auditing & Consulting firm with a well-established network of financial experts across India.
